summary: Focused unit/integration coverage passes 241 tests, but persisted pre-objective dispatch compatibility and asynchronous production runtime closure are unproven.

findings.detail: Objective was added to dispatch identity without compatibility for pre-objective persisted running or completed dispatches, risking duplicate runtime or rejected review evidence.
The canonical owner test stubs synchronous completion and does not prove real connector running-to-completed reuse through Guarded Run.

inspection.summary: Inspected Story, Architecture, Spec, test plan, changed runtime/session/action/task sources and seven focused suites; 241/241 passed while two migration/integration gaps remained.

judgment_delta: Broad focused coverage passed -> needs_changes because old persisted dispatch identity compatibility and real running-to-completed connector closure are not covered.
